debug_info.goal:
A B C P : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hABC : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, B, C]
hP : P ∈ interior ((convexHull ℝ) {A, B, C})
⊢ EuclideanGeometry.angle P A B ≤ Real.pi / 6 ∨
    EuclideanGeometry.angle P B C ≤ Real.pi / 6 ∨ EuclideanGeometry.angle P C A ≤ Real.pi / 6

failed_attempts:
by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  rcases h with ⟨h₁, h₂, h₃⟩
  let α := ∠ P A B; let β := ∠ P B C; let γ := ∠ P C A
  let α' := ∠ P A C; let β' := ∠ P B A; let γ' := ∠ P C B

  -- 1. Geometric Identities
  -- The product of sines identity (Trigonometric Ceva's Theorem) and the sum of base angles.
  have geometric_props : 
      Real.sin α * Real.sin β * Real.sin γ = Real.sin α' * Real.sin β' * Real.sin γ' ∧
      α + β + γ + α' + β' + γ' = π := by
    -- Proof requires Sine Rule on ΔPAB, ΔPBC, ΔPCA and sum of angles around P.
    sorry

  rcases geometric_props with ⟨ceva_eq, sum_eq_pi⟩

  -- 2. Lower bound on LHS
  -- Since α, β, γ > 30°, and clearly < 150° (else sum of other angles < 30°), sin > 1/2.
  have lhs_gt : Real.sin α * Real.sin β * Real.sin γ > 1 / 8 := by
    have sin_gt_half : ∀ x ∈ ({α, β, γ} : Set ℝ), Real.sin x > 1 / 2 := by
      intro x hx
      -- implies π/6 < x < 5π/6
      sorry 
    have s1 := sin_gt_half α (by simp)
    have s2 := sin_gt_half β (by simp)
    have s3 := sin_gt_half γ (by simp)
    nlinarith

  -- 3. Upper bound on RHS
  -- The sum of α', β', γ' is < 90°. The product of sines is maximized when they are equal.
  have rhs_lt : Real.sin α' * Real.sin β' * Real.sin γ' < 1 / 8 := by
    have sum_primes_lt : α' + β' + γ' < π / 2 := by linarith [h₁, h₂, h₃, sum_eq_pi]
    have log_sin_concave : ConcaveOn (Set.Ioo 0 π) (Real.log ∘ Real.sin) := by sorry
    -- By Jensen's Inequality on ln(sin(x)):
    -- 1/3 * Σ ln(sin(x)) ≤ ln(sin(Σ x / 3))
    -- Π sin(x) ≤ sin(Σ x / 3)^3
    -- Σ x / 3 < π/6 => sin(Σ x / 3) < 1/2 => Product < 1/8
    sorry

  -- 4. Contradiction
  rw [ceva_eq] at lhs_gt
  linarith
